item.title: Resume
item.description:
Harkeet Bal

204-997-6190 | balh@myumanitoba.ca | GitHub

Education

B.Sc. Computer Science, Minor in Statistics | Sept 2021 - Dec 2026

University of Manitoba | Winnipeg, MB

Awards:

  • UM Guertin Centennial Entrance Award (Tier 2)
  • Dean’s Honour List

Technical Skills

Languages: Python, SQL, Java, R, TypeScript, C#, C/C++

Frameworks: PyTorch, Apache Airflow, .NET, Vue.js, Spring Boot

Tools & Databases: Git, Docker, Oracle, Snowflake, PostgreSQL

Industry Experience

Data Engineer | Sept 2024 - Aug 2025

Richardson International | Winnipeg, MB
